'''Bugnaught''' was a type of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] used by the [[Rattataki/Legends|Rattataki]] as training adversaries. One in particular fought in [[the Cauldron]] on [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]. This Bugnaught burned [[Carl]] to [[Death/Legends|death]] with a [[Flamethrower/Legends|flamethrower]] installed in his arm, but was ripped to pieces by [[Blorga]].

Several other Bugnaughts belonged to [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]], which she used as [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] fodder.
